Faculty of Health Sciences

About the Faculty

Mission and Vision

MENU

Mission

The Faculty of Health Sciences at Istanbul Okan University is committed to contributing to society, science, and humanity by educating innovative and competent health professionals who act in line with universal scientific and ethical values, are equipped with scientific thinking skills, utilize technology effectively, and are dedicated to protecting, improving, and sustaining public health.

Vision

To become a leading faculty recognized nationally and internationally for its strong academic staff, modern educational approach, entrepreneurial vision, and dynamic structure open to continuous improvement—shaping innovations in the field of health sciences.
